title: SilkTouchSpawnerZ
description: A implementation of the wanted: Using Silk touch to mine spawners
body:
![SilkTouchSpawnerZ Description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4febc2f5999eadab63e740aaf69ccdf036c2aae4.png)
Advertisement:

Text version To use this plugin: ``` Download .jar Place the .jar in your server's plugins folder Restart your server Enjoy!~~~~ ``` The plugin features: ``` Ability to mine spawners with Silk Touch enchantment Preserves the mob type when mining and placing Displays the mob type in the item name (e.g., "Zombie Spawner") Works with Creative mode too Logs spawner mining and placement in the console ``` CONFIG: None! For once!
